title: Team

roleDescriptions.org_admin: Full access to all settings, billing, and team management.
roleDescriptions.sales_manager: Can view and edit all records in the organization.
roleDescriptions.sales_rep: Can manage their own records and shared records.

remove.title: Remove Team Member
remove.description: Are you sure you want to remove {name} from the organization? Their records will remain but they'll lose access.

empty.title: Just you for now
empty.description: Invite your team to collaborate in LeadForge.

limitReached: You've reached the user limit for your plan. Upgrade to add more team members.
